title: On Wee Johnny. Hic Jacet Wee Johnny.
content:
Whoe'er thou art, O reader, know,
            That death has murder'd Johnny!
        An' here his body lies fu' low
            For saul he ne'er had ony.
meaning:
Robert Burns's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On Wee Johnny. Hic Jacet Wee Johnny."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
